allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const files = ['.codex/config.toml', '.codex/agents/explorer.toml', '.codex/agents/planner.toml', '.codex/agents/implementer.toml', '.codex/agents/reviewer.toml', '.codex/agents/build-fixer.toml', '.codex/agents/docs-researcher.toml']; for \(const f of files\) { const c = fs.readFileSync\(f, 'utf8'\); const openBrackets = \(c.match\(/\\[/g\) || []\).length; const closeBrackets = \(c.match\(/\\]/g\) || []\).length; const triQuotes = \(c.match\(/\\"\\"\\"/g\) || []\).length; console.log\(f + ': brackets=' + openBrackets + '/' + closeBrackets + ', triple-quotes=' + triQuotes + \(openBrackets === closeBrackets && triQuotes % 2 === 0 ? ' OK' : ' SUSPECT'\)\); }")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { getSkillModules, getDefaultSkillModuleIds } from './cli/utils/scaffold.mjs'; const mods = getSkillModules\(process.cwd\(\)\); console.log\('模块总数:', mods.length\); console.log\('默认安装:', getDefaultSkillModuleIds\(process.cwd\(\)\)\); console.log\('workflow 模块路径数:', mods.find\(m => m.id === 'workflow'\).paths.length\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { getSkillModules, getDefaultSkillModuleIds } from './cli/utils/scaffold.mjs'; const mods = getSkillModules\(process.cwd\(\)\); console.log\('skill 模块总数:', mods.length\); console.log\('默认安装:', getDefaultSkillModuleIds\(process.cwd\(\)\)\); console.log\('workflow 模块 path 数:', mods.find\(m => m.id === 'workflow'\).paths.length\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { getSkillModules } from './cli/utils/scaffold.mjs'; import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; const mods = getSkillModules\(process.cwd\(\)\); let missing = 0; let total = 0; for \(const m of mods\) { for \(const p of m.paths\) { total++; if \(!existsSync\(p\)\) { console.log\('MISSING:', p\); missing++; } } } console.log\('总路径:', total, '; 缺失:', missing\);")
